Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Strings.Ascii.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

(* === Regular expression type === *)

Inductive reg_exp (T : Type) : Type :=
| EmptySet
| EmptyStr
| Char (t : T)
| App (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Union (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Star (r : reg_exp T).

Arguments EmptySet {T}.
Arguments EmptyStr {T}.
Arguments Char {T} _.
Arguments App {T} _ _.
Arguments Union {T} _ _.
Arguments Star {T} _.

(* === Match relation === *)

Reserved Notation "s =~ re" (at level 80).

Inductive exp_match {T} : list T -> reg_exp T -> Prop :=
| MEmpty : [] =~ EmptyStr
| MChar  : forall x, [x] =~ (Char x)
| MApp   : forall s1 re1 s2 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s2 =~ re2 -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (App re1 re2)
| MUnionL : forall s1 re1 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s1 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MUnionR : forall s2 re1 re2,
    s2 =~ re2 -> s2 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MStar0  : forall re, [] =~ (Star re)
| MStarApp : forall s1 s2 re,
    s1 =~ re -> s2 =~ (Star re) -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (Star re)
where "s =~ re" := (exp_match s re).

(* === Reflection === *)

Inductive reflect (P : Prop) : bool -> Prop :=
| ReflectT (H :   P) : reflect P true
| ReflectF (H : ~ P) : reflect P false.

(* === String as list of ascii === *)

Definition string := list ascii.

(* === Given helper lemmas (proofs provided) === *)

Lemma provable_equiv_true : forall (P : Prop),
  P -> (P <-> True).
Proof. intros. split. - intros. constructor. - intros _. apply H. Qed.

Lemma not_equiv_false : forall (P : Prop),
  ~ P -> (P <-> False).
Proof. intros. split. - apply H. - intros. destruct H0. Qed.

Lemma null_matches_none : forall (s : string),
  (s =~ EmptySet) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma empty_matches_eps : forall (s : string),
  s =~ EmptyStr <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MEmpty.
Qed.

Lemma empty_nomatch_ne : forall (a : ascii) s,
  (a :: s =~ EmptyStr) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma char_nomatch_char : forall (a b : ascii) s,
  b <> a -> (b :: s =~ Char a <-> False).
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. apply H.
  inversion H0. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma char_eps_suffix : forall (a : ascii) s,
  a :: s =~ Char a <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MChar.
Qed.

Lemma app_exists : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros. inversion H. exists s1, s2. split.
    * reflexivity.
    * split. apply H3. apply H4.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Happ [Hmat0 Hmat1]]]].
    rewrite Happ. apply (MApp s0 _ s1 _ Hmat0 Hmat1).
Qed.

Lemma union_disj : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (Union re0 re1) <-> s =~ re0 \/ s =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros H. inversion H; subst.
    + left. assumption.
    + right. assumption.
  - intros [H | H].
    + apply MUnionL. apply H.
    + apply MUnionR. apply H.
Qed.

(* === Exercises: lemmas to prove === *)

Lemma app_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re0 re1,
  a :: s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  ([] =~ re0 /\ a :: s =~ re1) \/
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma star_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re,
  a :: s =~ Star re <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re /\ s1 =~ Star re.
Proof. Admitted.

(* === Spec definitions === *)

Definition refl_matches_eps m :=
  forall re : reg_exp ascii, reflect ([] =~ re) (m re).

Definition is_der re (a : ascii) re' :=
  forall s, a :: s =~ re <-> s =~ re'.

Definition derives d :=
  forall a re, is_der re a (d a re).

Definition matches_regex m : Prop :=
  forall (s : string) re, reflect (s =~ re) (m s re).

(* === Functions to implement === *)

Definition match_eps : reg_exp ascii -> bool :=
  (* Returns true iff the regex can match the empty string.
     Structural recursion over the regex:
     - EmptySet: false
     - EmptyStr: true
     - Char _: false
     - App r1 r2: both must match empty
     - Union r1 r2: either matches empty
     - Star _: always true *)
  fix go (re : reg_exp ascii) {struct re} : bool :=
    match re with
    | EmptySet => false
    | EmptyStr => true
    | Char _ => false
    | App r1 r2 => andb (go r1) (go r2)
    | Union r1 r2 => orb (go r1) (go r2)
    | Star _ => true
    end.

Definition derive : ascii -> reg_exp ascii -> reg_exp ascii := todo.

Definition regex_match : string -> reg_exp ascii -> bool := todo.

(* === Theorems to prove === *)

Theorem match_eps_refl : refl_matches_eps match_eps.
Proof.
  unfold refl_matches_eps.
  intro re.
  induction re; simpl.
  - apply ReflectF. intros H. apply (proj1 (null_matches_none [])) in H. exact H.
  - apply ReflectT. constructor.
  - apply ReflectF. intros H. inversion H.
  - destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2].
    + apply ReflectT. apply (MApp [] re1 [] re2); assumption.
    + apply ReflectF. intros Hm. apply app_exists in Hm.
      destruct Hm as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hm0 Hm1]]]].
      destruct s0 as [|a s0'].
      * simpl in Heq. subst. apply H2. assumption.
      * inversion Heq.
    + apply ReflectF. intros Hm. apply app_exists in Hm.
      destruct Hm as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hm0 Hm1]]]].
      destruct s0 as [|a s0'].
      * simpl in Heq. subst. apply H1. assumption.
      * inversion Heq.
    + apply ReflectF. intros Hm. apply app_exists in Hm.
      destruct Hm as [s0 [s1 [Heq [Hm0 Hm1]]]].
      destruct s0 as [|a s0'].
      * simpl in Heq. subst. apply H1. assumption.
      * inversion Heq.
  - destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2].
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. assumption.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. assumption.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionR. assumption.
    + apply ReflectF. intros Hm.
      apply (proj1 (union_disj [] re1 re2)) in Hm.
      destruct Hm as [Hm1|Hm2]; [apply H1 in Hm1 | apply H2 in Hm2]; contradiction.
  - apply ReflectT. apply MStar0.
Qed.

Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem regex_match_correct : matches_regex regex_match.
Proof. Admitted.

diff_user_message.system:
You are an expert Coq proof engineer performing correct-by-construction
synthesis: simultaneously building an implementation AND its proof of
correctness.

## Goal

The .v file contains:
- `Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.` — typed hole for unfinished expressions
- A function signature with `todo` as the body.
- A lemma stating the specification of the function which is `Admitted.` —
  placeholder for an unfinished proof.

Your goal: fill every `todo`, and prove every lemma marked `Admitted.` with
`Qed.` After your edit, the file MUST compile with `coqc`. In particular, the
function should be fully implemented, and the lemma should prove its correctness.

We want to synthesize the program and generate its proof step by step in the
deductive synthesis style. You will be called multiple times. You are STRICTLY
FORBIDDEN from taking multiple steps or generating the full solution in one call.

In each call, **replace exactly one `todo` with an expression and prove its
corresponding lemma**. Fill a `todo` with one concrete expression:
   - A value: `true`, `0`, `nil`, etc.
   - A pattern match: `match x with | C1 => todo | C2 y => todo end`
   - A conditional: `if cond then todo else todo`
   - A recursive or function call
   Note that all the sub-expressions are `todo`.
   Leave all other `todo`s untouched.
   Add sub-lemmas (with appropriate preconditions) for any new `todo`
   expression, and declare them as `Admitted.` If the expression is a leaf,
   no new sub-lemma is declared.
   Use the sub-lemmas to prove the lemma for the filled `todo` expression
   (`Admitted.` → `Qed.`).
   Example: `Definition f : (nat -> bool) := todo.` becomes
   `Fixpoint f (n : nat) : bool := match n with | O => todo | S m => todo end.`
   and the main lemma for `f` is proved by induction using the sub-lemmas for
   the `todo`s in the base and inductive cases, which are declared `Admitted.`

If there are standalone `Admitted.` lemmas with no corresponding `todo`
(all expressions already filled), you may prove one such lemma directly.

## Rules

- The file MUST compile with `coqc` after every edit.
- Do NOT remove or rename existing lemmas/theorems, or change their statements.
  Only fill in proofs.
- Do NOT use `exact todo.` or a similar trivial tactic to close a proof —
  that defeats the purpose. Only close proofs with real tactics.
- Do NOT replace multiple `todo`s in one call.
- Do NOT prove multiple `Admitted.` lemmas in one call.
- Add `Require Import` statements as needed.

## Scoring

score = Qed / (Qed + Admitted + todo).
- Doesn't compile → 0 (you will see the coqc error and can retry).
- Compiles, no Admitted, no todo → 1.0 (done).

You will be called for up to 30 iterations.

Arguments EmptyStr {T}.

Qed.

    + right. assumption.

    + apply MUnionR. apply H.
Qed.

(* === Spec definitions === *)

  forall re : reg_exp ascii, reflect ([] =~ re) (m re).

Definition derives d :=

Definition matches_regex m : Prop :=

(* === Functions to implement === *)

Definition match_eps : reg_exp ascii -> bool :=
  (* Returns true iff the regex can match the empty string.
     Structural recursion over the regex:
     - EmptySet: false
     - EmptyStr: true
     - Char _: false

     - Star _: always true *)
  fix go (re : reg_exp ascii) {struct re} : bool :=
    match re with
    | EmptySet => false
    | EmptyStr => true
    | Char _ => false
    | App r1 r2 => andb (go r1) (go r2)

    | Star _ => true
    end.

Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Strings.Ascii.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

(* === Regular expression type === *)

Inductive reg_exp (T : Type) : Type :=
| EmptySet
| EmptyStr
| Char (t : T)
| App (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Union (r1 r2 : reg_exp T)
| Star (r : reg_exp T).

Arguments EmptySet {T}.
Arguments EmptyStr {T}.
Arguments Char {T} _.
Arguments App {T} _ _.
Arguments Union {T} _ _.
Arguments Star {T} _.

(* === Match relation === *)

Reserved Notation "s =~ re" (at level 80).

Inductive exp_match {T} : list T -> reg_exp T -> Prop :=
| MEmpty : [] =~ EmptyStr
| MChar  : forall x, [x] =~ (Char x)
| MApp   : forall s1 re1 s2 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s2 =~ re2 -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (App re1 re2)
| MUnionL : forall s1 re1 re2,
    s1 =~ re1 -> s1 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MUnionR : forall s2 re1 re2,
    s2 =~ re2 -> s2 =~ (Union re1 re2)
| MStar0  : forall re, [] =~ (Star re)
| MStarApp : forall s1 s2 re,
    s1 =~ re -> s2 =~ (Star re) -> (s1 ++ s2) =~ (Star re)
where "s =~ re" := (exp_match s re).

(* === Reflection === *)

Inductive reflect (P : Prop) : bool -> Prop :=
| ReflectT (H :   P) : reflect P true
| ReflectF (H : ~ P) : reflect P false.

(* === String as list of ascii === *)

Definition string := list ascii.

(* === Given helper lemmas (proofs provided) === *)

Lemma provable_equiv_true : forall (P : Prop),
  P -> (P <-> True).
Proof. intros. split. - intros. constructor. - intros _. apply H. Qed.

Lemma not_equiv_false : forall (P : Prop),
  ~ P -> (P <-> False).
Proof. intros. split. - apply H. - intros. destruct H0. Qed.

Lemma null_matches_none : forall (s : string),
  (s =~ EmptySet) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma empty_matches_eps : forall (s : string),
  s =~ EmptyStr <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MEmpty.
Qed.

Lemma empty_nomatch_ne : forall (a : ascii) s,
  (a :: s =~ EmptyStr) <-> False.
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. inversion H.
Qed.

Lemma char_nomatch_char : forall (a b : ascii) s,
  b <> a -> (b :: s =~ Char a <-> False).
Proof.
  intros. apply not_equiv_false. unfold not. intros. apply H.
  inversion H0. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma char_eps_suffix : forall (a : ascii) s,
  a :: s =~ Char a <-> s = [].
Proof.
  split.
  - intros. inversion H. reflexivity.
  - intros. rewrite H. apply MChar.
Qed.

Lemma app_exists : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros. inversion H. exists s1, s2. split.
    * reflexivity.
    * split. apply H3. apply H4.
  - intros [s0 [s1 [Happ [Hmat0 Hmat1]]]].
    rewrite Happ. apply (MApp s0 _ s1 _ Hmat0 Hmat1).
Qed.

Lemma union_disj : forall (s : string) re0 re1,
  s =~ (Union re0 re1) <-> s =~ re0 \/ s =~ re1.
Proof.
  intros. split.
  - intros H. inversion H; subst.
    + left. assumption.
    + right. assumption.
  - intros [H | H].
    + apply MUnionL. apply H.
    + apply MUnionR. apply H.
Qed.

(* === Exercises: lemmas to prove === *)

Lemma app_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re0 re1,
  a :: s =~ (App re0 re1) <->
  ([] =~ re0 /\ a :: s =~ re1) \/
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re0 /\ s1 =~ re1.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma star_ne : forall (a : ascii) s re,
  a :: s =~ Star re <->
  exists s0 s1, s = s0 ++ s1 /\ a :: s0 =~ re /\ s1 =~ Star re.
Proof. Admitted.

(* === Spec definitions === *)

Definition refl_matches_eps m :=
  forall re : reg_exp ascii, reflect ([] =~ re) (m re).

Definition is_der re (a : ascii) re' :=
  forall s, a :: s =~ re <-> s =~ re'.

Definition derives d :=
  forall a re, is_der re a (d a re).

Definition matches_regex m : Prop :=
  forall (s : string) re, reflect (s =~ re) (m s re).

(* === Functions to implement === *)

Definition match_eps : reg_exp ascii -> bool :=
  (* Returns true iff the regex can match the empty string.
     Structural recursion over the regex:
     - EmptySet: false
     - EmptyStr: true
     - Char _: false
     - App r1 r2: both must match empty
     - Union r1 r2: either matches empty
     - Star _: always true *)
  fix go (re : reg_exp ascii) {struct re} : bool :=
    match re with
    | EmptySet => false
    | EmptyStr => true
    | Char _ => false
    | App r1 r2 => andb (go r1) (go r2)
    | Union r1 r2 => orb (go r1) (go r2)
    | Star _ => true
    end.

      * simpl in Heq. subst. apply H2. assumption.
      * inversion Heq.
    + apply ReflectF. intros Hm. apply app_exists in Hm.

      * inversion Heq.
    + apply ReflectF. intros Hm. apply app_exists in Hm.

      destruct s0 as [|a s0'].
      * simpl in Heq. subst. apply H1. assumption.
      * inversion Heq.
  - destruct IHre1 as [H1|H1]; destruct IHre2 as [H2|H2].
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. assumption.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionL. assumption.
    + apply ReflectT. apply MUnionR. assumption.
    + apply ReflectF. intros Hm.

Definition derive : ascii -> reg_exp ascii -> reg_exp ascii := todo.

Theorem derive_corr : derives derive.
Proof. Admitted.
=======
(* Brzozowski derivative of regular expressions w.r.t. a character.
   - d_a(∅) = ∅
   - d_a(ε) = ∅
   - d_a(c) = ε if a = c, else ∅
   - d_a(r1 · r2) = (d_a r1) · r2  |  if ε ∈ L(r1) then ∪ d_a r2
   - d_a(r1 ∪ r2) = d_a r1 ∪ d_a r2
   - d_a(r*) = (d_a r) · r*
 *)
Fixpoint derive (a : ascii) (re : reg_exp ascii) : reg_exp ascii :=
  match re with
  | EmptySet => EmptySet
  | EmptyStr => EmptySet
  | Char c =>
      match ascii_dec a c with
      | left _ => EmptyStr
      | right _ => EmptySet
      end
  | App r1 r2 =>
      Union (App (derive a r1) r2)
            (if match_eps r1 then derive a r2 else EmptySet)
  | Union r1 r2 => Union (derive a r1) (derive a r2)
  | Star r => App (derive a r) (Star r)
  end.
